workflow: Stereotomy voussoir arch: cells from the Arch Voussoirs component (D5F10012) carved from ETH1100 rubble (best-of-candidates match + CGAL intersect to the radial voussoir cell)
cell_source: Arch Voussoirs component (Frahan > Voussoir, GUID D5F10012)
match: best of 8 ETH1100 candidate stones per cell, scaled to 1.5x cell diagonal, centroid-aligned
fix_2026_06_07: Every voussoir is now either a CGAL-trimmed rubble stone (bounded by its cell) or, if no valid trim is found, the CLEAN cut cell. The earlier version kept the raw un-trimmed boulder on a failed trim, which overshot the arch (the reported bug). 11/11 are real rubble trims here; 0 raw boulders.
note: each radial voussoir cell (Arch Voussoirs component) trimmed by CGAL intersect from a matched ETH rubble stone posed over it; valid rubble-trim where the result is closed and within the cell volume, else clean cut-cell fallback (never the raw stone); radial bed joints per stereotomy (Frezier/Monge)
